violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The floor by the three bay is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, potato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Sliced cheese, turkey, and ham was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The dishwasher located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. All sanitizing being done in three bay. Establishment is to have dishwasher repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door refrigerator, fryolator, and counters have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment is to clean and maintain all non food contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The floor by the three bay is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The floors and walls have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
